languageStrings.LBL_MAILBOX_HELP: Configure your personal IMAP and SMTP account for sending and receiving mail in the CRM.
languageStrings.LBL_IMAP_FOLDER_SENT_HELP: Use the exact IMAP folder name from the server (e.g. Sent), not the webmail label (e.g. Wysłane). Run Test connection to list folders.
languageStrings.LBL_IMAP_FOLDER_BROWSER_HELP: IMAP folder tree from your mail server. Click a folder to use it as Sent in CRM.
languageStrings.LBL_ENCRYPTION_NOT_ACTIVE: Encryption is not active. Contact the administrator.
languageStrings.LBL_NO_MAIL_ACCOUNT: Configure your mailbox in My Preferences to send mail with this template.
languageStrings.LBL_CONFIGURE_MAILBOX: Configure your mailbox in My Preferences to send mail.
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_RATE_LIMIT: Send rate limit exceeded. Try again in a minute.
languageStrings.LBL_DROP_ATTACHMENTS_HERE: Drop files here or click to browse
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_ATTACHMENT_LIMITS_HINT: Up to %s files, %s MB each, %s MB total
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_ATTACHMENT_MODAL_DROP: You can also drop files anywhere in this window
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_ATTACHMENT_TOTAL_TOO_LARGE: Total attachment size exceeds the limit
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_ATTACHMENT_BLOCKED_TYPE: This file type is not allowed
languageStrings.LBL_MAIL_TEMPLATE_ATTACHMENTS_BLOCKED: Cannot send: a template attachment file is missing on disk. Fix the document or re-upload it in the template editor.
